case_title: PEREZ MARITZA A VS KELLY JANET

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY PEREZ MARITZA A AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY JANET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY JANET

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ MARITZA A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY JANET $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,828.00, POSSESSION NOT GRANTED TO PLAINTIFF ANOTHER PARTY APPEARED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KELLY JANET HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-24-1991, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY JANET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
